content.situation: 两人在聊天时发现彼此都喜欢同一类音乐，想进一步交流推荐
content.speakerText: You like indie folk too? I've been listening to this artist nonstop lately!
content.speakerTextCn: 你也喜欢独立民谣？我最近一直在循环听这位歌手！
content.responseTemplate: ___! I just discovered their latest album last week.
content.hint: 用表达惊讶和共鸣的短语开头，强调共同兴趣带来的惊喜
content.knowledgePoint: 表达惊讶与共鸣的口语感叹词

content.situation: 同事在午休时提到喜欢徒步，你也有相同爱好，想建立联系
content.speakerText: I love hiking on weekends — there's nothing better than fresh air and quiet trails.
content.speakerTextCn: 我周末超爱徒步——没有什么比新鲜空气和安静的小路更棒了。
content.responseTemplate: ___! I’ve been trying to explore new trails near the mountains this month.
content.hint: 用加强认同感的感叹词回应，表示你也有同样热情
content.knowledgePoint: 表达强烈认同的口语回应结构

content.situation: 你在咖啡馆听到别人说喜欢看老电影，你也有相同爱好，想开启对话
content.speakerText: I still watch black-and-white films every Friday night — they feel so timeless.
content.speakerTextCn: 我每周五晚上都看黑白电影——它们有种永恒的感觉。
content.responseTemplate: ___? I rewatched Casablanca last night — it’s my all-time favorite!
content.hint: 用表达难以置信但兴奋的语气开头，拉近彼此距离
content.knowledgePoint: 用感叹词建立情感共鸣的社交表达
